description_long: This stuffed toy is a plush representation of a classic cartoon mouse character, featuring a large round head with prominent black ears, a pale face, and a small black nose. The eyes are elongated ovals with a sleepy or relaxed expression, and the mouth is small with a subtle smile. The toy is dressed in shiny red shorts with two white buttons, large yellow shoes, and white gloves with black accents on the hands. Its limbs are slightly elongated and rounded, giving it a soft, huggable appearance, and a thin black tail extends from the back. The surface appears smooth and slightly glossy, especially on the shorts and shoes, while the rest of the body has a matte, plush texture.
description: A plush cartoon mouse toy with large black ears, red shorts, yellow shoes, and a soft, huggable body. The face has a relaxed, sleepy expression and the surface is mostly matte with some glossy accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, red shorts with white buttons, yellow shoes, and white gloves clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, protruding nose, and the thin black tail extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, red shorts, yellow shoes, and the full length of the tail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, nose, and tail, mirroring the left side.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is relaxed and sleepy, with half-closed eyes and a small, subtle smile. The eyebrows are neutral, contributing to the calm demeanor.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Standing upright with arms slightly extended outward and legs apart, the head facing forward and the tail extending straight back.
